title: AGY-331: Advanced Container Sandboxing (L300)
author: tridorian Labs & Google Cloud
description: Configuring local distrobox or devcontainers environments using the portable agy-box OCI image to run high-autonomy agent loops safely.

features.title: Host Isolation
features.description: Lock down agent execution environments using rootless Podman and user namespaces to prevent host compromise.

features.title: Distrobox Integration
features.description: Configure distrobox for seamless terminal development while enforcing strict home directory isolation.

features.title: Devcontainers Spec
features.description: Implement enterprise-grade .devcontainer.json configs to run agents safely in VS Code with limited permissions.
